raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX a balance transfer was initiated from XXXX XXXX ( account ending XXXX ) to XXXX XXXX XXXX ( account ending XXXX ). {$3700.00} was transferred to Citicard, who then incorrectly applied the amount to Citicard XXXX ( account ending XXXX ) instead of going to XXXX XXXX ( account XXXX ) on XX/XX/XXXX. Citicard directed me to XXXX Bank XXXX, and XXXX Bank XXXX referred me back to Citicard. Citicard would not help. The documents are attached.
